task: Fix snipe thesis 0% accuracy — auditor blind to reconciled trades
local_output: trade_auditor._verify_signals() only reads from flight_data.get('scout_scan', {}) which is always empty for reconciled trades. scout_claims all default to 'unknown', accuracy computes to 0.0%
opus_correction: Added scout_context fallback: audit_trade() accepts scout_context dict, _verify_signals() uses it when flight_data has no scout_scan. outcome_reconciler passes fan_state/fan_direction/momentum_state/e100_role/story_entry_type from live_trades columns through to auditor.
opus_reasoning: Reconciled trades have all scout context stored in live_trades at entry time but the auditor only knew about the flight_recorder path. The data was there all along — it just needed a second lookup path.

task: Add crash-safe rollback/retry to learning pipeline
local_output: Pipeline had a gap: reconciler COMMITs pnl_pips (trade marked done), then audit/learning runs. If audit crashes, trade is orphaned — reconciler won't re-send it, learning never processes it.
opus_correction: Added learning_status column ('pending'→'complete') to live_trades. Reconciler sets pending on UPDATE, queries pending on next run for recovery. _cleanup_partial_audit() purges stale audit rows + flight_log entries before re-run. knowledge.json made idempotent via processed_trade_ids tracking.
opus_reasoning: Two-phase commit pattern: the reconciliation and learning are separate transactions. learning_status bridges them — it's the 'prepared' flag that says 'I committed phase 1 but phase 2 hasn't finished yet'. On recovery, re-run phase 2 with cleanup first.

task: Analyze pipeline write behavior for safety under repeated runs
local_output: User asked: does running daily or multiple times a day cause overwrites or accumulation? Need to trace every write path.
opus_correction: Full audit: reconciler idempotent via pnl_pips IS NULL guard, auditor idempotent via INSERT OR REPLACE, vault learnings append-only (harmless duplicates), knowledge.json counters WERE dangerous for double-counting — fixed with processed_trade_ids. Dashboard self-caps at 200.
opus_reasoning: The key insight is distinguishing narrative data (vault markdown — duplicates are just noise) from metric data (knowledge.json counters — duplicates corrupt win rates and averages). Only the metric path needed idempotency protection.

task: Fix vault reindex failing on stale worktree path
local_output: learning_integrator._get_vault_writer() added vault dir to sys.path but vault_writer.py internally does 'from knowledge.indexer import ...' which needs the PARENT of the knowledge dir on the path.
opus_correction: Added parent = os.path.dirname(vdir) and sys.path.insert(0, parent) so the knowledge package can be resolved.
opus_reasoning: Python package imports require the parent directory of the package on sys.path, not the package directory itself. knowledge/ is a package, so its parent must be importable.

task: Wire TRADE_CLOSE into flight_recorder from outcome_reconciler
local_output: check_learning_flow() expects trade_close stage in flight_log but reconciled trades never logged it. Learning flow checker reported these trades as incomplete.
opus_correction: Added flight.record(stage=FlightStage.TRADE_CLOSE, ...) after each live_trades UPDATE in reconciler. Wrapped in try/except so reconciler works even if flight_recorder unavailable.
opus_reasoning: The flight_recorder is the observability backbone. Every stage of a trade's lifecycle needs to be recorded so the learning pipeline can verify completeness. Reconciled trades were invisible because they bypass the normal trading_cycle path.

task: Nightly sentry — complete pipeline execution and multi-issue triage
local_output: Ran all 5 pipeline phases. Reconciled 222 OANDA trades, 7 matched. Rolling audit flagged snipe thesis 0% accuracy. Flight recorder healthy (14 learning_complete cycles) but check_learning_flow reported 0 trade_closes.
opus_correction: Full sentry report: 71.4% win rate on 7 reconciled trades, 13 learnings extracted, 2 vault pushes. Identified 3 issues: snipe accuracy (pause recommended), vault reindex failing on stale worktree, flight_recorder TRADE_CLOSE not logged. Fixed learning_integrator.py missing `import sqlite3` — silent NameError was suppressing all winning setup-revenue learnings.
opus_reasoning: The missing import was a classic silent failure — sqlite3.Row was used before sqlite3 was imported, causing NameError only in the winning-trade code path. The fix is a one-line import but the diagnostic required reading the full traceback chain. Pattern: always check imports when a specific code path fails silently without obvious errors.

task: Debug outcome_reconciler schema mismatch — decision_id vs id
local_output: outcome_reconciler.py queried trade_decisions using decision_id column which does not exist. OperationalError: no such column: decision_id. All reconciliation failing.
opus_correction: Read reconciler source and ran pragma table_info(trade_decisions) to confirm actual column name is `id` not `decision_id`. Fixed via edit_file replacing decision_id → id in the query. Single-field rename, root cause was mismatched assumption about schema naming convention.
opus_reasoning: Schema mismatches between code and DB are fast to diagnose: read the code, then read the actual schema, compare. Never assume column names from variable naming conventions — always verify against pragma table_info or equivalent.

task: Diagnose trade_audits empty table — rolling_audit 0 rows
local_output: rolling_audit() requires 3+ rows in trade_audits but table has 0 rows. audit_trade() has never been called. Trades in trade_decisions have pnl_pips but audit layer was never invoked.
opus_correction: Root cause: the per-trade audit_trade() call was missing from the post-reconciliation workflow. trade_decisions has outcomes but they never flowed into the audit pipeline. Fix path: either wire audit_trade() into reconciler post-processing or run one-time bootstrap to audit all reconciled trades and seed trade_audits.
opus_reasoning: A two-layer pipeline (reconcile → audit) where layer 2 depends on data from layer 1 will silently have an empty output table if layer 2 is never invoked. Always verify the call chain is actually wired end-to-end, not just that both layers exist.

task: Diagnose $0.82/pip display bug for EUR_USD 10K units
opus_correction: The pip_value was derived from unrealized_pl/pnl_pips, but pnl_pips uses mid-price while OANDA unrealizedPL uses bid/ask. For USD-quoted pairs, use direct calculation: units * pip_size. For cross pairs, keep the ratio with tighter thresholds.
opus_reasoning: Spread discrepancy between mid-price and bid/ask causes the ratio to be inaccurate. Direct calculation is exact for USD-quoted pairs.

task: Diagnose server crashes from concurrent Claude Code sessions
opus_correction: Concurrent Claude Code sessions cause FUSE mmap corruption via two paths: (1) stale -shm files from unclosed sqlite3 connections, (2) .py file writes during imports triggering dirty DB handle inheritance. The FUSE defense patches (fuse_cleanup.py, PRAGMA mmap_size=0) need a clean restart to take effect.
opus_reasoning: FUSE-mounted filesystems have mmap semantics that differ from native filesystems. Multiple processes opening the same SQLite DB through FUSE can corrupt the shared memory mapping.

task: Analyze scout V4 daily performance and validator conversion rate
opus_correction: 0% TRADE_NOW rate despite 10 strong setups (story>=70, trending+expanding). EUR_CHF ATR threshold at exactly 0.00040 blocking a +5.3p winner — lower to 0.00038. scout.db disk I/O errors at 07:01 from premature DB close in learning system. AUD_JPY cascade 2hr escalation delay from 5-bar detection to 13-bar CRITERIA_MET.
opus_reasoning: Validator conservatism and ATR threshold precision need calibration. The scout.db reliability bug is separate from the FUSE issue — it's a code-level premature connection close.
